fixes_verified.note: Tech-spec line 77 now documents runInference call with input = text as String (comment: 'Contents собирается внутри'). Matches Gallery signature at LlmChatModelHelper.kt:243-252 (input: String).

Tech-spec line 78 now correctly names the third resultListener arg as partialThinkingResult: String?. Matches typealias ResultListener in LlmModelHelper.kt:26-27: (partialResult: String, done: Boolean, partialThinkingResult: String?) -> Unit.

Tech-spec line 229 softens rationale to 'присутствует в Gallery... тянется предположительно как транзитивная... пиннинг для совместимости с Kotlin 2.2.0. На этапе Task 2 первая успешная сборка подтвердит необходимость'. T-R2 risk at line 317 corroborates (grep → 0 direct uses). No longer overstates.

KSP version is now consistently 2.3.6 in tech-spec: line 109 (T2 versions list), line 238 (plugin entry with explicit 'выравнивание с Decision T2'). No more 2.2.0-2.0.2 contradiction. T-R1 risk still mentions compatibility verification in Task 2.

T10 (line 166) now states 'готовый публичный метод в копируемом файле, ui/llmchat/LlmChatModelHelper.kt:238-241, вызывает instance.conversation.cancelProcess()'. Confirmed in Gallery file at lines 238-241: override fun stopResponse(model: Model) { val instance = model.instance as? LlmModelInstance ?: return; instance.conversation.cancelProcess() }. The 'если его нет' hedge is removed.

Tech-spec line 80 now correctly says 'закрывает instance.conversation и мутирует его на новый (создан через engine.createConversation); сам model.instance и engine не пересоздаются'. Matches Gallery LlmChatModelHelper.kt:201: 'instance.conversation = newConversation'. The engine is preserved across reset.

T5 rationale at line 128 now explicitly says 'lifecycle-process добавляется отдельной строкой в libs.versions.toml (без BOM — lifecycle-libraries разделены), версия совпадает с lifecycle-runtime-ktx = 2.8.7 по соглашению'. No BOM claim.
Tech-spec line 190 now lists constructor order correctly: '(status, totalBytes, receivedBytes, errorMessage, bytesPerSecond, remainingMs)'. Matches Gallery Model.kt:362-369 exactly.

new_mirages.claim: tech-spec line 78: 'Ошибки приходят отдельно через onError: (Throwable) -> Unit'
new_mirages.reality: Gallery LlmModelHelper.kt:108 and LlmChatModelHelper.kt:248 declare onError as '(message: String) -> Unit' (with default {}). The callback receives a formatted String, not a Throwable. In LlmChatModelHelper.kt:296 it's invoked as onError("Error: ${throwable.message}").
new_mirages.source: tech-spec.md, Architecture > How it works > Load / inference flow, step 3
new_mirages.fix: Replace 'onError: (Throwable) -> Unit' with 'onError: (message: String) -> Unit' to match the Gallery LlmModelHelper interface. Also update the wording — the ViewModel receives a pre-formatted error string, not a raw exception.
